untranslatable_reason: EEDB (Expanding Equilateral Diamond Bottom) is a visual chart pattern that requires shape recognition (diamond formation with expanding width and equilateral properties). This cannot be expressed using only price/volume indicators and mathematical operators. The specific pattern detection logic would require multi-bar pattern matching or ML-based shape recognition not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using rising volume trend proxy (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 as a substitute for volume rise detection). Exit condition set to close below SMA_20 as a reasonable reversal signal since author did not specify exit rules. Success rates from source (38% bull, 26% bear) and average rise percentage data were unavailable (marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Full pattern-based rules cannot be translated without pattern recognition capabilities.
